text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara finally manages to finish a race in first
place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her excitement is apparent as she gleefully tells
me what the wind at the front of the pack feels
like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bursting with joy at taking first place, a fire
ignites in Haru Urara's heart, and she vows to win
even more races.
